title: CREATE: Vanilla Plus
body:
## # **A Vanilla plus, Create Modpack.**

_sorry if my english is not perfect, im french..._

This modpack add a lot of vanilla plus features like new biomes, mobs, features, and Create!

There are some create addons like: Create deco, Create Enchantment Industry, Create Stuff & Additions or Create Utilities.

If you want new content in the end, dont worry because the end has been updated with: Enlightend and Unusual End (theres also compatibily with create).

the modpack adds in 4 new overworld ores (lead, silver, zinc and jade), 6 new End ores (malachite, bismuth, irradium and more...) and 13 gems that can enchant your gear in unique ways (ruby, sapphire, pyrite and more...).

If you want to explore a world with new cave biomes, enhanced nether, new end content, create, 7 new wood type, a bunch of new building blocs, new mobs, new structures, and have fun with your friends or in singleplayer, then play this modpack...
It doesn't have that many mods so you can easly run it with shaders or on a potato pc.

There are some bugs and crashs (like with the sliding stone from supplementaries that juste crash you game if you interact with it for some reason...), but i dont really know how to fix them... There are also some ore and gems that have the same name (like malachite and air malachite...) but its not to big of an issue.

_You can play this modpack in multiplayer and it is also fully optimised._
